description: A clean aps:action:v1 receipt. Verifies under the shipped Ed25519 + RFC 8785 JCS path. receipt_id equals sha256 of the empty-id, empty-signature canonical form.

scope_of_claim.asserts: aps:action:v1. the gateway observed the agent issue this action under the cited delegation chain.
does_not_assert: that the off-protocol side effect actually completed
that the agent understood the consequences of the action
that the underlying business outcome was correct
